hook.text: ARSENAL OUT — UNITED LEAD THE RACE

beats.text: WEST HAM FACE PRESSURE TO SELL BY JUNE 30
UNITED LEAD MADRID AND PSG FOR THE MIDFIELDER
PERSONAL TERMS NO PROBLEM — DEAL EXPECTED

caption: Ducker (Telegraph) and Wheeler (Daily Mail) both say United lead the race for Mateus Fernandes — Arsenal have been priced out by West Ham's £80m tag. PSG and Madrid lurk but United are in front. Can we seal it before the window even opens? 🔴 Per Telegraph / Daily Mail.
